author: Ameen Hassan
summary: Session reviewing the glossary implementation that had recently been added to the pipeline, suspected to have been done incorrectly. Ran a logic inspector audit to verify glossary integration correctness and then QA'd the findings. After confirming issues, created a plan to implement fixes. Also reviewed a Word document describing the pipeline to check whether it reflected the current state and to identify needed revisions. The session involved multiple continuation prompts suggesting it ran long or involved multiple context resets, and ended with Ameen requesting to save the session to the personal context memory repo.
problems: Glossary implementation suspected to be incorrect — needed verification against actual pipeline code
Logic inspector findings needed QA before acting on them to avoid unnecessary changes
Word document describing the pipeline may be stale relative to current implementation
approaches: Checked latest codebase changes focusing on glossary addition
Ran logic inspector audit on the glossary implementation
QA'd audit findings to confirm they were accurate
Created a fix plan based on confirmed issues
Reviewed Word document against current pipeline state and drafted revision suggestions
Requested session save to personal context memory repo at end of session
results: Glossary implementation issues identified and confirmed via logic inspector + QA
Word document reviewed with revision suggestions produced
Session concluded with memory save request

decisions.decision: Fix glossary implementation based on confirmed logic inspector findings

open_questions: What specific glossary implementation errors were found and what fixes were applied?
Which sections of the Word document needed updating to reflect current pipeline state?
